hero.desc: Elizabethtown's favorite family owned outdoor destination. 18-hole course, game yard, rooftop bar, food truck, and a private party room — all in one place.

hours.closure: Follow us on Facebook for weather closures

pricing.junior_desc: Ages 5–10. A full round of fun on our 18-hole course — putter and ball included. Great for kids getting into the game.
pricing.adult_desc: Ages 11+. Includes a full 18-hole round with putter and ball. Perfect for date nights, groups, and competitive putters.
pricing.little_desc: Ages 4 & under play free! Bring the whole family without worry — the littlest putters are always on us.

party.title: Book the Par-Tee Room
party.desc: Perfect for birthday parties, corporate outings, bachelor/bachelorette parties, and more. Our private room overlooks the course and comes fully equipped.
